60秒任务: 「询问政策」：投诉/政策/要求/方案；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 投诉｜政策｜责任｜要求｜补偿｜解决方案评估
场景族: 诊所前台｜银行/服务窗口｜邮局｜维修柜台｜咨询室
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Could you explain the policy on ___?（询问政策）
What are the rules for ___?（询问规则）
Is there a written policy I can see?（要求书面政策）
Does this policy apply to my case?（确认适用性）
Are there any exceptions?（询问例外）
Who has the authority to approve this?（询问审批权）
What documents do you need from me?（确认材料）
How long does the process usually take?（询问周期）
Is there a deadline for submitting ___?（确认截止时间）
Can you clarify the refund policy?（澄清退款政策）
What happens if the item is damaged?（询问损坏情况）
Can this be reviewed by a manager?（请求经理复核）
I’d like to understand my rights here.（了解权利）
Is there an appeal process?（询问申诉）
Could you send that to me in writing?（请求书面确认）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: policy, rule, exception, document, refund, manager, deadline, appeal
Verbs: apply, approve, submit, review, clarify, refund, process, send
Adjectives / Status: written, eligible, damaged, valid, expired, official
Time / Place: in writing, within 30 days, at the desk, online, by email
Chunks: apply to my case, any exceptions, appeal process, refund policy, authority to approve
